description: Ask questions about your vault and get answers with verified citations to the exact notes and passages, powered by Claude's native Citations API. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: nord342
manifest.description: Ask questions about your vault and get answers with verified citations to the exact notes and passages, powered by Claude's native Citations API.
manifest.name: Claude Vault Citations

name: Claude Vault Citations

releases.author: nord342
releases.description:
Ask questions about your Obsidian vault — every answer cites the exact notes and passages that support it, powered by Anthropic's Citations API.

- BM25 retrieval finds the most relevant notes for each question
- Paragraph-level citations with clickable pills that jump to the source note
- Prompt caching keeps follow-up questions cheap and fast
- Configurable model Claude (Opus 4.7 / Sonnet 4.6 / Haiku 4.5), folders, and system prompt
